bead.title: Conformance suite and synthetic harness implementations
bead.description:
Source manifest: .ddx/beads-harness-interface-refactor.yaml
Source bead ID: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-02
Governing plan: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md

See the manifest and the plan for full context, touch-point inventory, and sub-sequence ordering.
bead.acceptance:
1. internal/harnesses/harnesstest package exports RunHarnessConformance, RunQuotaHarnessConformance, RunAccountHarnessConformance, RunModelDiscoveryHarnessConformance
2. Synthetic constructors NewSyntheticQuotaHarness, NewSyntheticAccountHarness, NewSyntheticModelDiscoveryHarness accept Supported* values as parameters
3. Conformance suite asserts emitted Windows[].LimitID is a subset of SupportedLimitIDs(); asserts ResolveModelAlias covers SupportedAliases() positive path and rejects out-of-set with ErrAliasNotResolvable
4. Suite asserts contract shape of single-flight (no error, consistent post-state on concurrent RefreshQuota), not exact probe count
5. Smoke test runs synthetic harnesses against the conformance suite and passes
